rulings.Case Title: AGONAFER SHIFERAW VS. JASON H. FRESKOS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Order For Release Of Bond And Dissolution Of Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 9, 2017, line 1. PLAINTIFF AGONAFER SHIFERAW's MOTION For Order For Release Of Bond And Dissolution Of Injunction GRANTED - none of the parties will be injured by the release and dissolution because there is no foreclosure pending, and no opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BARBARA FEDUN VS. RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBITRATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Writ Of Mandate
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 9, 2017, line 7. PETITIONER BARBARA FEDUN's Motion For Writ Of Mandate OFF CALENDAR due to improper service and notice, and failure to obtain the record of proceedings. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JENNIFER KORBIN ET AL VS. JASON CHOW ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 9, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANTs JASON CHOW, SAMUEL CHOW and DAISY CHOW's Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement GRANTED. The motion meets the Tech-Bilt standard, and no opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HONG ZHENG VS. LUN JI XU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant'S Lun Ji Xu And Zheng Zhi Xu'S Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 9, 2017, line 3. DefendantS Lun Ji Xu And Zheng Zhi Xu'S Demurrer To Complaint OFF CALENDAR - First Amended Complaint on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CALVIN PON VS. ALFREDO SANTOS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion To Vacate Default
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 9, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT ALFREDO SANTOS' Motion To Vacate Default DENIED. Defendants failed to comply with 3-day notice in the amount of $1,400, and there is no showing of mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or excusable neglect. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 3180 SAN BRUNO LLC VS. RICO TIGER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion , Motion To Vacate Defalut Aand Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 9, 2017, line 5. DEFENDANT RICO TIGER's Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment HEARING REQUIRED to address whether Defendant paid the $2,473 sought in the 3-day notice, and if not, whether he is able to post the amount. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend The Terms Of A Judgment Or Alternatively Enforce And Carry Out The Terms Of A Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 9, 2017, line 6. DEFENDANT 2195 GREEN STREET CONDOMINIUM ASSO's Motion To Amend The Terms Of A Judgment Or Alternatively Enforce And Carry Out The Terms Of A Judgment HEARING REQUIRED to address: (1) who is responsible for the cost of the deck; (2) authority supporting modification of judgment as opposed to injunction; (3) why access to Plaintiff's garage is necessary; and (4) whether the Court has jurisdiction to impose special assessment on the homeowners. = (501/REQ)
